clue: A survivor shaped by speed, pressure, and refusing to follow the path chosen for her.
hints: Her past is tied to engines and independence.
Family expectations are a big part of her story.

clue: A survivor who learned how dangerous ambition can become when fame matters more than people.
hints: Her life was tied to the music industry.
She stood close to someone who became much worse.

clue: A survivor who moves like rules were only ever suggestions.
hints: Her style feels restless and city-born.
She was one of the earlier post-launch survivors.

clue: A survivor whose confidence came from screens, pressure, and needing to prove she could win.
hints: Her background is tied to competition.
She is strongly connected to gaming.

clue: A survivor drawn to stories, rituals, and old beliefs most people would ignore.
hints: Her theme leans mystical.
Her gameplay impact is tied to Boons.

clue: A survivor who does not look like a natural leader, but keeps ending up in that role anyway.
hints: His perks are heavily team-focused.
He is one of the original survivors.

clue: A survivor built around speed, escape, and pushing herself further than she probably should.
hints: Her perks are very chase-friendly.
Running is one of her strongest themes.

clue: A killer who turned attention, performance, and applause into something sharp.
hints: His style is bright and polished.
His fame is part of what makes him dangerous.

clue: A killer whose presence makes ordinary technology feel cursed.
hints: Survivors can carry something connected to her power.
Screens are one of the biggest signs.

clue: A killer who can make distance feel unsafe long before she reaches you.
hints: Sound gives her away before a normal chase starts.
Her power rewards aim.

clue: A killer who turns observation into control, but can lose power when watched back.
hints: Stealth and exposure are central.
The mask is one of the easiest signs.

clue: A killer who can make survivors waste time and second-guess themselves before the real chase even starts.
hints: Her pressure is tied to a second objective placed on survivors.
The traps are not on the ground.

clue: A killer who can make the whole map feel unsafe through teleportation and unpredictability.
hints: She can bypass normal routes and obstacles.
Her power is tied to blinking through space.

clue: A killer who can make the whole map feel unsafe through unpredictable traps and pressure.
hints: His power is tied to throwing bottles that affect survivors.
The traps can cause a variety of problems.

clue: A killer who can make a chase feel like a guessing game where sight is not always enough.
hints: She can become invisible and move quickly.
Her power is tied to her connection to the spirit world.

clue: A killer identity built around a group, shared violence, and the kind of chaos that spreads fast.
hints: The mask is not always the same face.
Their pressure comes from moving quickly between people.

clue: A killer whose pain, expression, and black-winged imagery became something the Fog could twist.
hints: Her power reaches across distance.
Her theme is tied to ink, birds, and grief.
